defect: misreading mark colors (red=electric, yellow=gas, blue=water, green=sewer, orange=comm - pure ID item)
prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. The observed field condition is: misreading mark colors (red=electric, yellow=gas, blue=water, green=sewer, orange=comm - pure ID item). title: Compliance check: Locates & marking (commercial project)
